title: Beyond Lands
description: Over 60 mods to improve your Minecraft experience and have fun with your friends!
body:
![Beyond Lands Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff4385bfe6fe55673793df747e9ae7d4094bc91.png)

### Welcome to **Beyond Lands**, a exploration-based lightweight modpack of over 60 mods that improve the QoL of Minecraft and add more content to the original game!

## -= CONTENT =-



- Over 60 mods
- More structures & biomes
- Optimisation mods
- Create & addons
- Better exploration
- LAN support
- More things coming soon!

*(only available on Modrinth)*


## JOIN THE DISCORD // [CLICK HERE](https://discord.gg/AdDkBRbvNq)

```
HOPE YOU WILL ENJOY.
```
